## Summary of Changes

### Related Task / Issue

- **Description:** [Brief task/issue title]

---

## Type of Change
Please check the options that are relevant:
- [ ] **Feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] **Bug Fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] **Chore** (routine maintenance, dependency updates, or config changes)
- [ ] **Refactor** (code restructuring with no functionality changes)
- [ ] **Documentation** (changes to docs/markdown files only)
- [ ] **Test** (adding or updating tests with no code changes)

---

## Impact & Risk Assessment

### Database Changes
- [ ] Yes (Schema migrations or database structural updates are included)
- [ ] No

### API / Breaking Changes
- [ ] Yes (Existing endpoints modified or deprecated, new dependencies required)
- [ ] No

### Environment / Config Updates
- [ ] Yes (New environment variables or `.env` templates modified)
- [ ] No

## Pull Request Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines defined in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (`ARCHITECTURE.md`, `README.md`, etc.).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have verified that the public surface binds properly (serving on port 3000 where applicable).
- [ ] I have requested reviews from the appropriate team members (refer to `.github/CODEOWNERS`).
